message:
fix: cache hooks test timeout in clearAllStorage tests (#5040)

The IndexedDB mock's makeTransaction() didn't support oncomplete/onerror
callbacks. clearAllStorage() awaits transaction.oncomplete in a Promise
which never resolved, causing 4 tests to timeout at 5s.

Fix: add oncomplete/onerror to the mock transaction and fire oncomplete
on next microtask, matching real IndexedDB behavior.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
